findings.message: [Release Train Engineer] skills: Azure Boards health check returned NOT_FOUND for project 'unplughq', which blocks the mandatory Task-First lifecycle for delegated specialist work even when artifact production is otherwise ready to proceed.
findings.suggestion: Add a documented contingency path for early-phase artifact work when Azure project registration lags repo initialization, or add a pre-delegation validation step that fails before specialist invocation begins.

findings.message: [Content Strategist] agents: Content Strategist agent cannot automatically verify completion of Work Item states without direct CI access or terminal permissions.
findings.suggestion: Allow agents a read-only terminal or direct Azure Boards API integration context to self-validate if terminal tools are withheld.

findings.message: [Release Train Engineer] docs: The invocation context places AB#207 in Sprint 1 and AB#201 in Sprint 2, but current draft P3 planning artifacts still show the reverse allocation.
findings.suggestion: Add an explicit reconciliation step in P3 before RTE program-board work so PO and SM artifacts reflect the latest committed sprint allocation.

enhancementCandidates.recommendation: Strengthen technology neutrality enforcement in Gate 1 evaluation criteria
